text: A strange quiet settles over me in this eerily dark and tilted modern space. The emptiness and dim lighting bring an uncanny sense of isolation and a mild, unsettling curiosity. I wonder what kind of work or innovation once filled this silence, now echoed only by the occasional hum of distant lights. There is both a peace and a quiet apprehension in being here, as if I am alone at the threshold of something waiting to be remembered.
